rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0001
rows.name:
What's wrong, Tora? Staring
blankly at the scenery like that.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0002
rows.name: Hm? Boss?

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0003
rows.name:
I was thinking that Dad
was captured here, mo...

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0004
rows.name:
I see, this is where he was forced
to produce artificial Blades.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0005
rows.name:
Dad is actually timid and weak-willed,
and couldn't do anything bad, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0006
rows.name: But they made him...

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0007
rows.name: Tora...?

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0008
rows.name:
Having to make such ugly Blades
with no man's romance... how painful, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0009
rows.name: Huh? Hang on a moment, Tora.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0010
rows.name: What is it, Boss, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0011
rows.name:
I thought you were sad because
your father was captured?

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0012
rows.name: That's not it, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0013
rows.name:
Dad was probably rather eager
while working on them, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0014
rows.name: Really...?

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0015
rows.name: That's right, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0016
rows.name:
As proof, Kiku and Sakura are
packed with Dad's tastes, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0017
rows.name: Yeah, I can't deny that...

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0018
rows.name:
But I can't forgive the artificial Blades
Bahn forced Dad to make. No man's romance, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0020
rows.name: What's wrong, Boss, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0021
rows.name:
No, I'm just realizing how... intense
your family's passions are...

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0022
rows.name:
Of course, mo! Tora's family risks
our lives for man's romance, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0023
rows.name: Let me ask Tora about something.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0024
rows.name: What kind of person was Professor Senzo?

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0025
rows.name: What kind of person was Professor Tatezo?

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0101
rows.name: Grandpa Senzo, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0102
rows.name:
Hana is curious too, mo.
Please tell us, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0103
rows.name:
Hmm... Tora doesn't remember
much about Grandpa, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0104
rows.name: Is that so?

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0105
rows.name:
Grandpa devoted himself to research
and always stayed shut in his lab...

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0106
rows.name: Spent all his time experimenting, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0107
rows.name: No, he read piles of naughty books, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0109
rows.name:
Grandpa was especially particular
about looks and mannerisms, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0110
rows.name:
Not mature adult women, either; he sought
the form of innocent young maidens, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0111
rows.name:
Huh? That's what he was
particular about!?

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0112
rows.name:
That smells seriously criminal, mo.
Hana is disgusted, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0113
rows.name:
Mo-mo!? Hearing that from Hana
hurts like it's about Tora, mo...

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0114
rows.name:
Anyway, Grandpa kept obsessing
over maidenly forms and behavior...

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0115
rows.name:
To realize that, he finally completed
the ether furnace, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0116
rows.name:
He also obsessed over self-destruct
functions and secret equipment, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0117
rows.name:
As he secretly grinned over
his blueprints, his back...

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0118
rows.name:
Even young Tora could feel
the aura of a mad scientist, mo...

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0119
rows.name:
So that great invention was a
crystallization of his desires.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0120
rows.name:
Your family really is
something else, Tora...

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0121
rows.name:
The current Hana seems
to embody that too.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0122
rows.name:
Hana has very mixed feelings
about this, mo...

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0201
rows.name: Dad Tatezo, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0202
rows.name:
Hana wants to know about him too, mo!
Please tell us, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0203
rows.name:
Dad Tatezo was fairly shy and
poor at talking with people, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0204
rows.name: So he buried himself in research, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0205
rows.name:
Yes, mo. Apparently he spent
every day on research, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0206
rows.name:
So even at his graduation party,
he was alone, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0207
rows.name:
But luckily, that made
Mom ask him to dance, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0208
rows.name:
She said he was so hopeless
she couldn't leave him alone, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0209
rows.name: Huh, I see.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0210
rows.name:
So where is Master's mother
now, mo?

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0211
rows.name:
In the end, she left saying
Dad was hopeless, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0212
rows.name:
So the reason for meeting
and parting was the same.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0213
rows.name:
Dad and Grandpa were absorbed in
making artificial Blades like Kiku and Hana, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0214
rows.name: Mom seemed fed up with that, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0215
rows.name:
That's understandable, mo.
Even Hana feels that way sometimes, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0216
rows.name:
It was necessary to pursue romance
and make our dreams reality, mo!!

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0217
rows.name:
That's what Dad says, but be careful
bringing it up. He gets very depressed.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0218
rows.name:
For three days and nights, he binge-eats
and drinks until he recovers, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0219
rows.name:
That sounds like a lot of trouble,
so Hana will be very careful, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0220
rows.name:
He sacrificed various things
to make great inventions.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0221
rows.name:
But it's moving to think that's how
we got to meet Hana.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0222
rows.name:
Hana has mixed feelings,
but Hana is grateful to Master, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0223
rows.name:
Ahem, mo! Show Tora
more and more respect, mo!

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0224
rows.name: Hana doesn't really want to, mo.

rows.label: kizunatalk028_msg0225
rows.name: Why, mo!?
